sections.heading: This Order may be cited as 1he Chiefs (Recognition) (No. 5) Title
The person named in the Schedule to this Order is hereby
sections.text:
Recognition
recognised as being, within the area in Zambia described in the of chief
Schedule, the holder of the office specified in the Schedule.
SCHEDULE
(Paragraph 2)
Office Area Holder of Office
Chieft Chanje of the Chewa Rukuzye Moses Zulu
people of Chipata District
in the Eastern Province
LEVY P. MwANAWASA, sc,
President
LUSAKA
1st August, 2005
[CA.67/13]
Copies oft his Statutory Instrument can be obtainedf rom the Government Printer,
